landing.eyebrow: Clear. Verify am. Nobody fit change am.
landing.title: Naija first open, document-first election results platform.
landing.lede: We build am on top Form EC8A. Civil society dey run am. E dey answer to the people.
landing.feature1_body: Results dey show when different party and observer agree. No single point of fraud.
landing.feature2_body: Every number we show, you go see the EC8A wey we take am from.
landing.feature3_body: Every picture we hash am, every event we chain am, and we anchor to blockchain every thirty minutes.

agent.phone_lede: Put di phone number wey your party register.
agent.pu_footnote: Na only for dis polling unit you go submit. If you wan change am, talk to your party admin.
agent.pu_no_elections: No election dey active. Talk to your party admin.
agent.capture_lede: Snap di whole EC8A. Make sure say all four corners dey show and di signatures clear.
agent.confirm_offline_note: If you no get internet, e go upload by itself once di network come back.
agent.done_status_submitting: Don send. Dey wait for confirmation…
agent.done_status_queued: Don send. Dey wait for extraction worker…
agent.done_queue_remaining_one: 1 earlier submission still dey for offline queue.
agent.done_queue_remaining_many: {n} earlier submissions still dey for offline queue.
agent.drain_accepted: Don send. Dey wait for extraction…
agent.queue_discard_confirm: Throw away dis submission? Di picture go loss.
agent.err_phone_throttled: You don request too many code for dis number.
agent.err_ip_throttled: Too many code request from dis network.
agent.err_no_active_otp: No active code for dis number. Request new one.
agent.err_expired: Di code don expire. Request new one.
agent.err_too_many_attempts: Too many wrong tries. Request new code.
agent.err_already_consumed: Dem don use dat code finish.
agent.err_phone_not_provisioned: Dis number no register. Talk to your party admin.
agent.err_device_change_required: New device. Your admin go need approve am.
agent.err_no_pu_assigned: No polling unit assign give you.
